{"query":"Super Bowl LX venue stadium host city location Levi","model":"mako","response_time_ms":962,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Super_Bowl_LX","title":"Super Bowl LX - Wikipedia","content":"The game took place on February 8, 2026, at Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara, California, the second Super Bowl held in the stadium and the third held in the San Francisco Bay Area.
It became NBC's most-watched program in its history at around 125 million viewers worldwide and peaked at around 137 million worldwide, a 2% (~2 million viewers) decline from Super Bowl LIX a year prior.
On May 22, 2023, the NFL announced that Super Bowl LX would be played at Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara, California, home of the San Francisco 49ers.
Super Bowl XIX, played at Stanford Stadium in 1985, was won by San Francisco 49ers over the Miami Dolphins.
As has been a tradition since Super Bowl LVI, the logo includes Roman numerals featuring imagery from the host city/region.
The performance included guest appearances by Lady Gaga and Ricky Martin.

And while Santa Clara might not have the name recognition of San Francisco, its famous neighbor just 45 miles north, the city’s state-of-the-art stadium has become one of the league’s premier destinations for marquee events.
DeBartolo Way in Santa Clara, the 68,500-seat venue is home to the San Francisco 49ers.
Levi's Stadium broke ground in April 2012 and opened its doors in July 2014, replacing the 49ers' longtime home at Candlestick Park in San Francisco.
Beyond football, Levi’s Stadium has become a go-to venue for major events, like the College Football Playoff National Championship in January 2019 and WrestleMania 31 in 2015."},{"url":"https://abc30.com/post/super-bowl-2026-what-know-patriots-play-seahawks-levis-stadium-santa-clara/18527862/","title":"Super Bowl 2026: What to know as Patriots play the Seahawks at Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara - ABC30 Fresno","content":"SAN FRANCISCO -- The ultimate NFL matchup, the Super Bowl, is here!

The Bay Area's own Green Day will kick off the big game with an opening ceremony Feb."},{"url":"https://en.as.com/nfl/this-is-levis-stadium-the-venue-for-super-bowl-lx-capacity-cost-when-it-was-built-f202601-n/","title":"This is Levi’s Stadium, the venue for Super Bowl LX: capacity, cost, when it was built - AS USA","content":"Next month, Levi’s Stadium will host the Super Bowl for the second time, as the Seattle Seahawks go up against the New England Patriots for the Vince Lombardi Trophy.
What to know about the Super Bowl 2026 location
Inaugurated in July 2014, Levi’s Stadium is the home of NFL franchise the San Francisco 49ers - a team eliminated by Seattle in this season’s Divisional Round.
Levi’s Stadium’s typical seating capacity is 68,500, including 9,000 premium seats and 174 suites.
Other sports that have graced Levi’s Stadium include wrestling; indeed, WWE’s WrestleMania 31, staged in Santa Clara in March 2015, holds the venue’s attendance record of 76,976, according to the stadium’s website.
At Super Bowl LX, Green Day and Bad Bunny will become the latest musical acts to appear at the stadium: the Bay Area group is to headline the game’s opening ceremony, before the Puerto Rican rapper performs the halftime show.
8, 2026, with kickoff at Levi’s Stadium scheduled for 6:40 p.m."},{"url":"https://levisstadium.com/event/super-bowl-lx/","title":"Super Bowl LX","content":"Feb 8, 2026 — Super Bowl LX is headed to the San Francisco Bay Area on February 8, 2026, a guaranteed seat location for the Super Bowl … call 415-978-3610. 9 ..."}]}

At the Spring League Meeting on Monday, NFL owners approved the San Francisco 49ers' Levi's Stadium as the host site of Super Bowl LX in 2026. "The Bay Area was an incredible host for Super Bowl 50, and we are thrilled to bring the Super Bowl back," said NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell said in a statement on Monday. "We look forward to working with the 49ers and the Bay Area Host Committee to create an impactful Super Bowl LX in 2026 that showcases all the great things the region has to offer.".
